name: Shower Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large punch bowl, combine the thawed limeade with the 7-Up and the vodka.
2. Scoop the lime sherbert in large chunks and add to the punch bowl.
3. Add about one quart of ice cubes.
4. Stir gently until well combined and enjoy.
Wonderful for Bridal as well as Baby Showers. For Mom-To-Be, make some just for her, omitting the vodka.
